page_content:
ARTT748 Printmaking (3 Credits)

Independent studies in printmaking for advanced special students. Prerequisite: Permission of ARHU-Art department.

Repeatable to: 12 credits if content differs.

ARTT768 Graduate Colloquium (2 Credits)

Examines various aspects of art, art theory and criticism in a contemporary and multi-cultural context. Relates student work to this context.
